SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): OT line 

VALUES: Upper Arch (commencing in the upper right quadrant and rotating counterclockwise): Tooth # 1–16 or 
“Super#” 51–66. 

Lower Arch: Tooth # 32-17 or “Super #” 82-67. 

Primary Dentition: Upper Arch (commencing in the upper right quadrant and rotating 
counterclockwise): Tooth # A–J or “Super #” AS–JS” 

Primary Dentition: Lower Arch: Tooth # T–K or “Super #” TS–KS 

COMMENT: —
